leadText: The Griseous Core (Japanese: だいはっきんだま Great Platinum Orb) is an item introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It allows Giratina to change between its Altered and Origin Formes. It was a Key Item in Generation VIII. It is one of the orbs associated with the Pokémon of myth.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , when the Griseous Core is used from the satchel on Giratina, it switches between its Altered and Origin Formes. In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , if a Giratina is holding a Griseous Core, it changes to its Origin Forme. Additionally, it boosts Giratina's Dragon - and Ghost-type moves by 20%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA When used on Giratina, this large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form. S V An item to be held by Giratina. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Effect 1.2 Description 1.3 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , when the Griseous Core is used from the satchel on Giratina, it switches between its Altered and Origin Formes. In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , if a Giratina is holding a Griseous Core, it changes to its Origin Forme. Additionally, it boosts Giratina's Dragon - and Ghost-type moves by 20%. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA When used on Giratina, this large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form. S V An item to be held by Giratina. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods LA Turnback Cave (reward for catching or defeating Giratina to complete Request 91: "On the Trail of Giratina") S V Porto Marinada auction (if the player owns a Giratina )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Griseous Core's effect was previously granted in Generation IV through VIII if Giratina was holding the Griseous Orb instead. As of Generation IX , the Griseous Orb only boosts the power of Giratina's Dragon - and Ghost-type moves by 20% when held, but no longer changes Giratina to its Origin Forme.
